data.title: Fidia boosts capital as GGHL ups stake via new POC tranche and bond conversion
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Fidia Spa ( (IT:FDA) ) has provided an announcement.

Fidia S.p.A. has issued the fourth tranche of its 2026 reserved convertible bond with warrants to Global Growth Holding Limited, placing 25 bonds for a nominal €250,000 and granting 3,125,000 new warrants exercisable into shares at €0.08 each. The warrants are not listed, have a five‑year term, and bring the total outstanding POC‑related warrants to 10,625,000, reinforcing GGHL’s option‑based exposure to Fidia’s equity.

In parallel, GGHL converted three of the newly issued bonds into one million Fidia shares at €0.03 per share, increasing subscribed capital under the POC to €780,000 and the company’s share capital to €10,627,761.90. Following this conversion, Fidia now has 42,542,927 shares in issue and 22 POC bonds still outstanding, signalling continued dilution but also ongoing investor support to finance the group’s activities in high‑tech milling and numerical control systems.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:FDA) stock is a Sell with a EUR0.11 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Fidia Spa stock, see the IT:FDA Stock Forecast page.

More about Fidia Spa

Fidia S.p.A., based in Turin and listed on Euronext Milan, is a global player in numerical control technology and high‑performance integrated milling systems. With over 50 years of experience and around 135 employees, it serves mainly the automotive mould and aerospace sectors, offering numerical controls, high‑speed milling machines and CAM software that span the entire milling process from programming to finished part.

Average Trading Volume: 1,211,278

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: €999.5K

For a thorough assessment of FDA stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Spark Energy Minerals Retracts Prior Rare Earth Data After Regulator Review
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from St. Anthony Gold Corp ( (TSE:SPRK) ) is now available.

Spark Energy Minerals issued a clarifying statement after a request from the Canadian Investment Regulatory Organization, retracting previously disclosed total rare earth elements, magnet rare earth oxides and certain gallium figures from presentations and promotional materials. The company said those composite values assumed full recoveries and lacked sufficient metallurgical testing and technical context, and it cautioned investors not to rely on prior comparisons between the Arapaima Project and more advanced nearby operations.

Spark also acknowledged that some third-party promotional commentary paid for on its behalf was speculative and unbalanced, including language implying potential resource or reserve development that is not supported at this exploration stage. It has introduced stricter review procedures for all marketing content to ensure securities law and NI 43-101 compliance, and directed investors to an updated presentation while reaffirming its commitment to transparent, qualified technical reporting.

More about St. Anthony Gold Corp

Spark Energy Minerals Inc. is a Vancouver-based exploration company focused on advancing its Arapaima Project, which targets lithium, rare earth elements and gallium. The company is listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange, OTC markets and Frankfurt, and emphasizes compliance with Canadian NI 43-101 standards for technical disclosure as it progresses early-stage exploration work.

Average Trading Volume: 1,056,201

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$8.42M

Erste Group Bank ( (EBKOF) ) has issued an announcement.

Erste Group Bank AG has announced the publication of its 2025 annual financial report, fulfilling regulatory disclosure requirements under article 124 of the Austrian Stock Exchange Act. The report is available on the bank’s investor relations website, providing shareholders and market participants with detailed insight into the group’s financial performance and position for 2025.

By releasing the 2025 year-end figures, Erste Group enhances transparency for investors across its core markets, including Vienna, Bucharest, and Prague. The disclosure supports informed investment decisions and may influence market perception of the bank’s financial strength, risk profile, and strategic execution in the Central and Eastern European banking sector.

Erste Group Bank AG is a leading Central and Eastern European financial services provider headquartered in Vienna, Austria. data.title: Viyash Scientific Secures Shareholder Approval for New Leadership and ESOP Grant
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Viyash Scientific ( (IN:VIYASH) ) just unveiled an update.

Viyash Scientific Limited has announced that shareholders have approved, via remote e-voting through a postal ballot, several key management appointments and compensation matters, including the appointment and remuneration of Dr. Haribabu Bodepudi as Managing Director and Group CEO for a two-year term. Investors also cleared special resolutions to grant stock options exceeding 1% of the company’s issued capital to an identified employee in a single year, and to appoint Rajaram Narayanan and Srinivas Vasireddy as whole-time directors, moves that consolidate the leadership team and signal a focus on executive stability and incentive alignment.

The company confirmed that all four special resolutions were passed with the requisite majority as of March 12, 2026, in compliance with Regulation 44 of SEBI’s Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements. By securing shareholder backing for these governance and remuneration measures, Viyash Scientific strengthens its management structure, potentially enhancing strategic execution and corporate oversight, with details of the voting outcomes and the scrutinizer’s report made available on its website for investor transparency.

More about Viyash Scientific

Viyash Scientific Limited, formerly known as Sequent Scientific Limited, is an India-based listed company with its registered office in Hyderabad and its shares traded on both BSE and the National Stock Exchange of India under the symbol VIYASH. The company operates in the broader scientific and pharmaceutical-related sector, with a shareholder base engaged through remote e-voting and postal ballot mechanisms in line with Indian listing regulations.

Average Trading Volume: 37,982

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: 85.41B INR

data.title: VEON Posts Record 2025 Digital Growth as Profits Surge and Buybacks Expand
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

VEON ( (VEON) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 13, 2026, VEON reported strong fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results, driven by rapid expansion of its digital and financial services businesses. Fourth-quarter revenue rose 17.4% year-on-year to USD 1.17 billion and EBITDA grew 29.1%, while digital revenues surged 84.1% to represent 20.1% of group revenue, and full-year 2025 revenue and EBITDA increased 9.9% and 18.8% respectively, with digital contributing USD 759 million and a 17.3% revenue share.

The company coupled these results with balance sheet strengthening and active capital returns, including equity free cash flow after leases and licenses of USD 624 million, net debt to EBITDA reduced to 1.09x, and execution of a USD 100 million buyback alongside a second ongoing program. Strategic moves in 2025 and early 2026 — such as the Kyivstar secondary offering, acquisitions in Ukraine including Tabletki.ua, spectrum wins for Jazz in Pakistan, settlement of historic shareholder claims with Dhabi Group, index inclusions and a listing upgrade on Nasdaq — underline VEON’s shift toward a diversified digital operator model and aim to reinforce its market positioning ahead of its targeted mid‑single‑digit to low‑teens revenue and EBITDA growth in 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (VEON) stock is a Buy with a $75.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on VEON stock, see the VEON Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VEON Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VEON is a Outperform.

VEON’s overall stock score is driven by strong earnings call performance and valuation, indicating potential undervaluation. Financial performance is solid but impacted by high leverage. Technical analysis supports a positive outlook with bullish momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on VEON stock, click here.

More about VEON

VEON Ltd., formerly VimpelCom, is a NASDAQ-listed digital operator providing converged connectivity and digital services across five countries that together account for more than 6% of the world’s population. The group serves nearly 150 million connectivity users and over 135 million digital users, focusing on technology-led offerings that span communications, digital financial services, and emerging verticals such as healthcare, ride-hailing, and online marketplaces.

Muyuan Foods Co Ltd Class H ( (HK:2714) ) has shared an announcement.

Muyuan Foods Co., Ltd. has announced that its board of directors will convene a meeting on March 27, 2026 to review and approve the annual results for the financial year ended December 31, 2025, as well as to consider recommending a final dividend. data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Silver Eagle Mines Inc. ( (TSE:NOP) ) has shared an update.

Nevada Organic Phosphate Inc. announced that CEO Robin Dow will be featured on the long-running Business Television (BTV) “Discover Investing Opportunities” program, airing March 14 on the Fox Business Channel. BTV, a 28-year-old investment show targeting sophisticated investors, plans to spotlight the company as part of its focus on resource-cycle opportunities and emerging growth stories.

The broadcast exposure underscores Nevada Organic Phosphate’s efforts to raise its profile among investors as it advances its large organic sedimentary phosphate project in northeast Nevada. Given the project’s scale, claimed uniqueness in North America, and proximity to major transportation routes, the feature could enhance market awareness and support capital-markets interest in the company’s exploration and potential development plans.

More about Silver Eagle Mines Inc.

Nevada Organic Phosphate Inc. is a junior exploration company focused on organic sedimentary raw rock phosphate in northeast Nevada. The company controls a 6.6-kilometre-long phosphate bed, with applications extending the potential strike length to more than 30 kilometres, and it positions the asset as the only known large-scale organic sedimentary phosphate project in North America, located near key highway and rail infrastructure serving Nevada and California.

data.title: Tyler Technologies Launches New $200 Million Buyback Plan
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Tyler Technologies ( (TYL) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 13, 2026, Tyler Technologies, Inc. adopted a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan with a brokerage firm to repurchase up to $200 million of its common stock between March 16 and April 30, 2026. The plan operates under the company’s long-running share repurchase program, first launched in 2002 and most recently refreshed on February 3, 2026, when the board authorized up to $1 billion in buybacks and allowed the use of Rule 10b5-1 plans.

As of March 13, 2026, Tyler had $734.4 million of remaining repurchase capacity under this authorization, with buybacks generally funded from cash on hand and borrowings under its credit facility. By structuring the activity under Rule 10b5-1 and its insider trading policy, the company can execute prearranged repurchases even if it later comes into possession of material nonpublic information, providing a transparent and compliant mechanism for returning capital to shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TYL) stock is a Buy with a $393.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tyler Technologies stock, see the TYL Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TYL is a Outperform.

The score is primarily supported by strong financial performance (growth, cash generation, and low leverage) and constructive earnings-call guidance focused on continued SaaS momentum and durable free cash flow. These positives are meaningfully offset by weak technicals (broad downtrend and oversold signals) and a premium valuation (P/E ~47) that raises execution risk.

data.title: Coolpad Narrows 2025 Loss Despite Revenue Decline Through Cost Cuts and Asset Gains
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Coolpad Group ( (HK:2369) ).

Coolpad Group has warned investors that its loss attributable to shareholders for 2025 will narrow significantly to between HK$105 million and HK$125 million, from HK$252 million a year earlier. The improvement comes despite declines in revenue and gross profit, as the company exited loss-making smartphone products, granted rental concessions to tenants in Shenzhen, and focused on sustainable income streams.

The reduced loss is mainly driven by a sharp cut in administrative expenses of about HK$55 million and a HK$168 million rise in other income and gains from disposing of its CLSK investment and transferring certain patent rights. The figures are based on unaudited management accounts and may change, but the update signals progress in Coolpad’s cost control and asset monetisation strategy, with implications for its future financial stability and competitiveness in the crowded smartphone market.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2369) stock is a Sell with a HK$0.69 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Coolpad Group stock, see the HK:2369 Stock Forecast page.

More about Coolpad Group

Coolpad Group Limited is a Hong Kong-listed technology company incorporated in the Cayman Islands that operates primarily in the smartphone sector. The group also derives income from property-related activities in Shenzhen, positioning itself within both the consumer electronics and ancillary property leasing markets, where it faces intense competition and shifting profitability dynamics.

YTD Price Performance: -32.29%

Average Trading Volume: 1,050,130

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell
